abilities.name: Ledger Broker
abilities.text: The first contract you accept each session comes with hidden leverage already worked into the terms.

abilities.name: Silent Audit
abilities.text: Clear sectors yield sharper intelligence when you are the one left standing in them.

abilities.name: Debt Knife
abilities.text: Enemies tied to a route objective feel the weight of your mark before the strike lands.

abilities.name: Black File
abilities.text: Once per round, a finished job can be turned into leverage instead of mere survival.
